treatment_information.treatment_response: Effective pain relief initialy; no further nausea/vomiting reported

treatment_timeline.event: Admitted for severe abdominal pain and nausea/vomiting
Received morphine and fentanyl for pain management
Elective surgery planned for aorto-renal-celiac stenosis upon stabilization

patient_outcome.final_status: Stable upon discharge with good condition
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with vascular surgery and gastroenterology for anemia
patient_outcome.complications: Open back wound with mild purulent discharge
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Ongoing management for chronic abdominal pain and anemia
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Describes ongoing chronic abdominal pain, impacting daily activities
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient indicates the worsening abdominal pain may be due to aortic blockages
